nextSteps: Start a dedicated local Bun/Hono HTTP/3 spike server with HTTP/3 explicitly enabled.
Record Bun.serve({ h3: true }) or equivalent local HTTP/3 server configuration.
Record Resource Timing or server-side protocol evidence showing h3, not h2 or http/1.1.
Install or otherwise validate a local development CA on the Quest before claiming browser reachability.
Navigate the Quest Browser to the local HTTP/3 probe URL and record a successful load.
Run the compatibility probe from the physical Quest 3 browser; desktop Chromium evidence is not enough.
Confirm the Quest Browser page is foregrounded in the headset during the run.
Use a secure HTTPS origin trusted by the Quest Browser runtime.
Attempt a local WebTransport session only after HTTP/3 reachability is proven.
Record a successful local WebTransport session before making a WebTransport compatibility claim.
